attacking_style: Not an attacker - pure leadout specialist who works in final kilometers to set up team sprinters, particularly in reduced bunch scenarios after selective stages.
team_tactics: Operates as final leadout man in sprint train, capable of initiating winning sequences. Teams deploy him for pacing work earlier in stages, sometimes at cost of own sprint result.
terrain_preference: Selective stages that reduce peloton but still produce sprint finishes. Can survive challenging terrain while retaining enough to deliver leadout efforts. Pure sprint stages less clear.
vulnerability: Teams struggle to optimize his dual utility - strong enough to place top-10 without leadout support, but often committed to domestique duties that compromise personal result. Route selection critical.
key_patterns: Demonstrates leadout specialist role across teams (Bora-Hansgrohe, Alpecin), initiating winning sprint trains (2 observations)
Capable of top-10 finishes (4th, 7th) when riding for self after team duties (2 observations)
Extended pacing work earlier in stages, suggesting tactical misallocation of strong finishing ability (2 observations)
Performs in Catalunya's selective terrain repeatedly, indicating diesel engine resilience over multiple days (3 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Recent 2023 observations show consistent role execution but team tactical confusion about whether to use him as leadout or contender
